Interview Text:
Jacob (name changed):

(part 4)

He has had many experiences with spirits. First the good ones. Jacob was in his bed, which is in the same room as his son's lofted bed. He woke up and looked up at his son's bed and a little face was looking back at him. At first he thought it was Michael but then he realized Michael was with Jacob in his bed. Jacob got up and walked to the other bed. It was a blurry gray-white figure. He couldn't tell if it was a boy or a girl. The serene figure started to climb down the bed and then disappeared.

Another time he was sleeping on his side when he felt what he thought was Michael laying on his legs. However when he opened his eyes Michael was laying down right in front of him. When he worked up the courage he eventually looked up he saw a girl with short black hair and white skin. She was laying her head on her folded hands and on his legs. He thought maybe she was praying for him. She looked up but did not turn towards him and said "Don't be scared. It's going to be okay." She got up, turned to walk out and disappeared. 

But he has experienced a lot of dark spirits as well. One day, he had a dream that a dark spirit was coming toward him. He woke up and there was a jet black figure coming toward him. His son had woken up and was cowering against the wall in his bed. Jacob sat up and found his feet lifted off the ground. He flew toward the figure. But it felt like the room moved around him, instead of him flying through it. It was a male figure. He could see the eyes. It wanted Jacob to invite him in. Instead he shouted "Get out, in the name of Jesus." And it disappeared. Michael pulled him back into Jacob's bed. He said, "Dad did you see that?!" He wrapped his arms around Jacob and prayed like an adult for him for about ten minutes. Jacob was so proud of him.
